title: schoenus apogon
intro: Schoenus apogon, also known as the rice-rush or black rice-rush, is a type of sedge plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schoenus apogon include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
